app.title: Menap - Food Budget Planner
app.subtitle: Track and optimize your household food budgets

setup.title: Welcome to Menap
setup.desc: Plan and monitor your household food budgets, track item availability, and get alerts when items run out early.

search.empty: No items found matching your query.

settings.title: Settings
settings.export_desc: Save all your budgets, items, purchases, and settings into an encrypted backup file (.dem).
settings.import_desc: Restore your data and settings from a previously saved backup file (.dem or .sem).
settings.import_error: Failed to restore data. Please ensure the file is a valid .dem or .sem backup.
settings.font_demo: This is a preview of the text size...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.no_budgets: No active budgets for the selected date. Click below to plan one!
dashboard.items_exhausted_warning: Warning: {count} items ran out before budget ended!

budget.name: Budget Name
budget.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this budget and all its contents?
budget.no_items: No food items added to this budget yet.

item.name: Food Name
item.no_purchases: No purchases recorded for this item.
item.advice_desc: Tip: '{name}' ran out early in your last budget. We suggest budgeting {suggested} (original {original} + refill {refills}) for this interval.

contact.title: About Menap
contact.author: Developer
contact.desc: Menap is designed to help households track food budgets, monitor resource availability, and plan consumption efficiently.

logout.title: Log Out
logout.desc: Would you like to save your data before logging out? You can log in later by loading the QR Code or the backup file.
